svg.title: GyroPi — Performer screen
svg.desc: The performer's touchscreen showing the radial tilt indicator. 24 dial segments highlight toward the bottom-right to indicate current tilt direction. The blue ball drifts off-centre in that direction.
svg.text: Tilt registered — bottom-right · 30 Hz gyroscope updates
Performer screen — radial tilt dial, ball drifts in tilt direction
